notes.ClinicalNote: Tooth #30 presents with recurrent decay and fracture undermining the existing restoration. Patient reports pain with chewing and sensitivity to cold. Full-coverage restoration was recommended to restore function and prevent further structural loss.
Photographs and radiographic findings reviewed with patient. Remaining tooth structure is compromised, and buildup is required to support definitive crown treatment.
Generalized inflammation and pocketing documented. Non-surgical periodontal therapy completed in quadrants 1 and 4.
